name: Renamed Binary Detected
description: Detection of a known binary renamed for defense evasion. Adversaries may rename system utilities to avoid detection by security software or to blend in with legitimate processes. This detection specifically looks for a list of known binaries that have been renamed to evade detection.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the renamed binary detected at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The original binary `{original_binary}` was renamed to `{renamed_binary}`. The process ID involved was `{process_id}`. Analyze the command line (`{command_line}`) and the user (`{user_name}`) associated with the activity. Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action or a malicious attempt at defense evasion. Provide a summary of your findings and suggest immediate mitigation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the renamed binary was detected.

parameters.name: original_binary
parameters.description: The original name of the binary.

parameters.name: renamed_binary
parameters.description: The new name of the binary.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that was renamed.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the renamed binary.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
